chunks.title: Reign of Hezekiah
chunks.reason: Narrative summary of King Hezekiah's character and early military successes.

chunks.title: Fall of Samaria
chunks.reason: Historical account of the Assyrian conquest of Israel under Shalmaneser.

chunks.title: Assyrian Invasion of Judah
chunks.reason: Narrative describing Sennacherib's advance and Hezekiah's initial payment.

chunks.title: Rabshakeh's Speech to Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Extended dialogue and monologue where the Assyrian envoy taunts the city.
